title: Offshore drilling vessel
abstract: An offshore drilling vessel for operating in a body of water, the vessel defining a well centre and comprising an upper deck (107) and a lower deck (115) located below the upper deck, wherein moon pool (102) defines an opening in the lower deck. A Christmas tree carrier (111) is provided for positioning a Christmas tree (103) for deployment on the well centre below the upper deck, the Christmas tree carrier defining a Christmas tree storage area, wherein the Christmas-tree storage area is moveable across the moon pool and is vertically movable between an upper position and a lower position to maintain a clearance height between the Christmas tree storage, area and the upper deck.
claims: Claims CLAIMS: 1 . An offshore drilling vessel for operating in a body of water, comprising: an upper deck; a lower deck located below the upper deck; a moon pool defining an opening in the lower deck; a well centre; and a Christmas tree carrier for positioning a Christmas tree for deployment on the well centre below the upper deck, the Christmas tree carrier defining a Christmas tree storage area, wherein the Christmas-tree storage area is moveable across the moon pool and is vertically movable between an upper position and a lower position. 2. The vessel of claim 1 , wherein the storage area is movable between a storage position to a side of the moon pool adjacent the lower deck, and a deployment position on the well centre. 3. The vessel of claim 1 or 2, comprising a hoisting system aligned with the well centre, whereby in the deployment position the Christmas tree storage area is presented to the hoisting system. 4. The vessel of any preceding claim, wherein the Christmas tree carrier includes a platform and a frame, wherein the platform is vertically movable relative to the frame. 5. The vessel of claim 4, wherein the frame is translatable only in a horizontal plane. 6. The vessel of any preceding claim, wherein the Christmas tree carrier spans at least a portion of the moon pool. 7. The vessel of any preceding claim, wherein in the upper position the storage area is located relative to the lower deck so that a Christmas tree element may be skidded onto the storage area from the lower deck. 8. The vessel of claim 7, wherein in the upper position the storage area is flush with the lower deck. 9. The vessel of any preceding claim, wherein the storage area defines a cut-out to permit the storage area to accommodate an elongate member on the well centre. 10. The vessel of any preceding claim, wherein the storage area is lockable in a position on the well centre. 1 1 . The vessel of any preceding claim wherein in the lower position the storage area is below the lower deck. 12. The vessel of any preceding claim, wherein in the lower position the storage area is above an operational waterline of the vessel. 13. The vessel of any preceding claim, wherein in the lower position the storage area is within a splash zone and above an operational waterline of the vessel. 14. The vessel of any preceding claim, wherein the vessel has an operational waterline and in the lower position the storage area is at least one of: no more than 3 m above the operation waterline, no more than 2 m above the operational waterline, no more than 1 m above the operational waterline, no more than 0.5 m above the operational waterline, and at or below the operational waterline. 15. The vessel of any preceding claim, wherein the Christmas-tree carrier is located at least partly within a perimeter of the moon-pool. 16. The vessel of any preceding claims, comprising a crane operable to move one or more Christmas-tree components between the Christmas-tree storage area and a location displaced from the Christmas-tree storage area. 17. The vessel of claim 16, wherein the crane is movable between a first crane position above the Christmas-tree storage area and a second crane position displaced from the first position. 18. The vessel according to claim 17, wherein the Christmas-tree carrier is operable to lower the Christmas-tree storage area to the lower position when the crane is positioned at the first crane position and to the upper position when the crane is positioned at the second crane position. 19. A method of positioning a Christmas tree on a well centre of an offshore drilling vessel, the method comprising: locating the Christmas tree on a storage area of a Christmas tree carrier located adjacent a lower deck of the vessel and to a side of a moon pool of the vessel; translating the storage area and the Christmas tree located thereon across the moon pool to position the Christmas tree on the well centre below the upper deck; and vertically translating the storage area to provide a vertical clearance over the Christmas tree at least at the position on the well centre. 20. The method of claim 19, comprising moving the storage area between a storage position to the side of the moon pool adjacent the lower deck and a deployment position on the well centre. 21 . The method of claim 19 or 20, comprising presenting the Christmas tree to a hoisting system aligned with the well centre. 22. The method of any of claims 19 to 21 , comprising vertically translating the storage area to provide vertical clearance between the Christmas tree and the upper deck. 23. The method of any of claims 19 to 22, comprising vertically translating the storage area to provided vertical clearance between the Christmas tree and the upper deck at the well centre. 24. The method of any of claims 19 to 23, comprising lowering the storage area from an upper position by at least one of: 1 metre; 2 metres; 3 metres; 4 metres and 5 metres. 25. The method of any of claims 19 to 24, comprising locating the storage area at an upper position flush with the lower deck and skidding a Christmas tree element package onto the storage area from the lower deck. 26. The method of any of claims 19 to 25, comprising locking the storage area on the well centre. 27. The method of any of claims 19 to 26, comprising providing Christmas tree components and assembling the components on the carrier. 28. The method of claim 27, comprising lowering the storage area as the components are assembled.
